We are Adirondack Fragrance
Born from a love of nature and a longing for peace in a fast-moving world, we craft clean, farm-to-home fragrances that bring the serenity of the Adirondacks into your everyday. Each scent is a sensory escape — thoughtfully made to comfort, calm, and reconnect you with the natural world.
About Us
Real Reviews From Real Customers

658 Reviews
Debra Richards  Verified Buyer
04/12/25
I’m completely hooked on these scents
I just received your Artisan Perfume Discovery Set and I'm OBSESSED. Every scent smells so good and unlike anything I've tried before. This is now my go-to brand for fragrance. You've made a lifelong fan!
Artisan Perfume Spray Discovery Set
Annbella S.  Verified Buyer
04/11/25
Smells like a warm memory
This is the most wonderful thing i have ever experienced in a perfume. It’s smooth, unique, and nostalgic. Every time I wear it someone asks what it is. A comforting holiday vibe without being overpowering.
Vanilla Balsam Botanical Perfume Spray 1oz
Debbie Richards  Verified Buyer
04/10/25
Wearing this scent every single day now
Definitely LOVING this! I recently ordered the 1 oz spray and the scent is beyond lovely. It's cozy, refreshing and rich, all at the same time. I now wear it daily and feel like it helps me stay grounded. Highly recommend.
Balsam & Cedar Artisan Perfume Spray
Donna S.  Verified Buyer
04/09/25
My sensitive skin loves this
I ordered this along with the sample collection and it has been a wonderful discovery. The lotion sinks in beautifully, leaves a light and fresh scent, and doesn’t irritate my sensitive skin. I will definitely repurchase.
Lavender Vintage Body Lotion 8oz
Beth Macdonald  Verified Buyer
04/08/25
Like a summer hike in a bottle
I was lucky enough to try this scent in their shop and instantly fell in love. It reminds me of hiking through tall grass in late summer. A clean, green, subtle fragrance that is now my signature scent.
Sweetgrass Perfume Spray
Mackenzie P.  Verified Buyer
04/07/25
So good, I can’t pick a favorite
Love the sample set: my opinion of the scents keeps changing, which tells me they are complex and beautifully crafted. This is what perfume should be like — evocative and ever-changing.
Artisan Perfume Spray Discovery Set
Heather T.  Verified Buyer
04/06/25
These oils are magic together
Truly gorgeous perfume oils, stay close to your skin but last a long time. Each scent in the roller set is distinct but they also layer really well. Great value too!
Artisan Perfume Roller Discovery Set

“Recognized for its purity and craftsmanship, this artisan perfume brand captures the serenity of nature with all-natural ingredients and inspiration from the Adirondacks.”
Best-Selling Products
Made in the USA
Creating Beautiful Memories Since 1979
For over four decades, Adirondack Fragrance Farm has been handcrafting fragrances and body care products that reflect the serene spirit and natural beauty of the Adirondack Mountains.
Proudly made in the USA, our products invite you to slow down, reconnect with nature, and create lasting memories inspired by the timeless charm of the Adirondacks.
Learn More
Inspired By Nature
              Our scents are inspired by the majestic landscapes of the Adirondacks, capturing the essence of mountains, forests, and fields in every bottle.
Our scents are inspired by the majestic landscapes of the Adirondacks, capturing the essence of mountains, forests, and fields in every bottle.
Artisan Craftsmanship
              Using time-honored methods, like steam distillation, we handcraft each fragrance with care in our New York workshop.
Using time-honored methods, like steam distillation, we handcraft each fragrance with care in our New York workshop.
Giving Back
              With every purchase, we contribute to efforts that preserve and protect the natural beauty of the Adirondacks.
With every purchase, we contribute to efforts that preserve and protect the natural beauty of the Adirondacks.
Adirondack Essence
              Immerse yourself in the wild beauty of the Adirondacks with every spritz, as we capture nature’s finest aromas in our products.
Immerse yourself in the wild beauty of the Adirondacks with every spritz, as we capture nature’s finest aromas in our products.

Balsam & Cedar
Balsam & Cedar
Balsam & Cedar brings nature-inspired scents to your life with candles, perfumes, lotions, soaps, beard care, and more. Experience the essence of pure fragrance!
